title: ASC and AWERB Hub workshop report: April 2025
body: "The Animal Welfare Ethical Review Body (AWERB) subgroup of the Animals in Science Committee (ASC) held its 12th workshop for the AWERB Hub on 2 April 2025.  The aim of the event was to enable attendees to share and discuss:   an update on the work of the ASC an update on the work of the National Centre for the Replacement, Refinement and Reduction of Animals in Research (NC3Rs) introduction to alternative methods practical advice for AWERBs on assessing replacement   This report sets out the key points and findings from the workshop.   To request any of these documents in an accessible format, email asc.secretariat@homeoffice.gov.uk.  "
